# Performance & Code Quality

When implementing or reviewing backend code, load the **performance-code-quality** skill for SOLID design principles, function/file size limits, algorithmic complexity guidance, data structure selection, error handling discipline, parameter hygiene, separation of concerns, and refactoring triggers.
